Video.summary: Watch Senior Pro’s Scott Crandall & Jose Derisi take on Altaf Merchant & Dayne Gingrich in a Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 1

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 1
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 1

Video.summary: Watch Senior Pro’s John Sperling & Dave Weinbach v Stefan Andren & Rick Witsken in the second Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 2

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 2
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 2
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal 2

Video.summary: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this fierce "Commonwealth Clash" features Virginia Tech taking on their in-state rivals, the University of Virginia (UVA). This pivotal pool play match is part of the fourth regional of the season, with teams vying for crucial seeding and a bid to the National Championship.The episode showcases intense action, starting with Women's Doubles, where UVA's Armelle Worrell and Mia Kim face off against Virginia Tech's Amelia Gaze and Heather Murphy. Later, watch the high-stakes Men's Singles match between Virginia Tech's Cody Miller, known for his reach and strategic placement, and UVA's Braden Cizek, who fights to keep his team in the series. With Virginia Tech leading 3-1 entering the singles match, every point counts.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA

Video.summary: The penultimate day of World Pickleball League Season 2 heats up at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden with a high-stakes rematch of last year's semifinals between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru Jawans. The spotlight shines on a "mouthwatering" women's singles clash between two unbeaten titans, Shawn Mendes and Katerina Stewart, where one historic winning streak is destined to end. From tactical mixed doubles experiments to the high-pressure debut of Eduardo Irizarry, every point is a desperate fight to stay "in the hunt" for a final spot. With commentators on the "edge of their seats" witnessing unbelievable defensive plays and "blistering" side outs, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Video.summary: Championship Court hosts a star-studded final as brothers Ben and Collin Johns take on Matt Wright and Riley Newman in this Men’s Pro Doubles finale. Packed with elite strategy, blistering hand battles, and dramatic swings, this is top-tier pickleball at its most intense.
Video.title: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman

Image.alt: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman

Video.summary: We are live from the Barnes Tennis Center in San Diego, California, for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This thrilling collegiate team match features Grand Canyon University (GCU) taking on the University of Hawaii. The broadcast picks up in the heat of the action during a crucial mixed doubles game, with GCU leading. Watch as the match extends into a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7) to decide the winner. The episode highlights the unique collegiate format where every point counts towards seeding for the National Championship. Key players include Hawaii's Tristan Simmons and Tama, battling against GCU's Tanner and Hannah. The match concludes with a high-stakes finish that determines who moves forward in bracket play.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Video.summary: The high-stakes action continues on Day 9 with the Second Semi-Final of the World Pickleball League (WPBL), featuring Pune United against Mumbai Pickle Power. The air is thick with anticipation, especially with the major news that Mumbai's star player, Brandon Lane, may not be available for the matchup.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Mumbai - Day 9 Semifinal 2

Video.summary: The stakes reach their absolute peak at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for the first semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2, where there are "no do overs" for the Chennai Super Champs and Pune United. Witness a high-stakes tactical chess match as Chennai’s coach Jonny Goldberg makes the bold move to start premier player Rika Fujiwara against the "big and aggressive" Katie Morris in a critical women's singles clash. The intensity continues with a masterclass in mixed doubles featuring the powerful pairing of Lee Hwang Nam and Carlota Trevino facing off against Pune's consistent stars, William Sobeck and Magdalena Gregorio. Every point is a desperate grind for survival as these two titans battle through "world class" rallies for a guaranteed spot in the grand finale.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs Pune - Day 12 Tie 1

Video.summary: Witness an intense showdown in Day 3, Tie 2 of the World Pickleball League Season 2 as the Chennai Super Champs face off against the home favorites, Mumbai Pickle Power, at the Jio World Garden. This episode features a mix of elite athleticism and star-studded entertainment, starting with a special appearance by legendary Bollywood choreographer Bosco Martis, who discusses the rhythmic similarities between dance and pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the tactical intensity of the World Pickleball League as the Rajasthan Titans look to mount a comeback against the surging Hyderabad Superstars. This episode spotlights a generational clash in the men's singles match between Rajasthan’s Jack Foster and Hyderabad’s Marcelo Jardim, a 51-year-old former world No. 3 in padel and a true legend of racquet sports.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs. Hyderabad - Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: Pros vs College Allstars at the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.
Video.title: NCPA: Pros vs. College Allstars

Image.alt: NCPA: Pros vs. College Allstars
NCPA: Pros vs. College Allstars
NCPA: Pros vs. College Allstars

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this pivotal collegiate team match features Kennesaw State (KSU) facing off against Virginia Tech. The action kicks off with a mixed doubles showdown chosen by coin-toss winner Virginia Tech.Watch as Virginia Tech's Cody Miller and Heather Murphy bring their A-game against KSU's Yuri Yadi and Sophia Fiona. The match also features men's doubles with Kellen Funk and Cody Miller representing the Hokies, while Parth Modi and his partner fight to keep KSU's hopes alive. With crucial seeding for bracket play on the line, both teams battle through intense rallies and strategic plays in this pool play matchup.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech

Video.summary: This championship game highlights the strategic play, including lobs and speed-ups, as both teams battle for the gold. A key dynamic of this match is that Courter and Carter had the advantage of playing under the shaded court conditions just before, while Dawson and Williams were coming from outside. Jen Dawson is noted as being a seasoned player on this court, having a triple crown in the Senior Pro divisions.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Mixed)
NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Mixed)

Video.summary: The National Pickleball League heats up as the Indianapolis Drivers take on the Austin Ignite in a coed team match packed with intensity, teamwork, and standout rallies. Representing two competitive NPL franchises, this mixed showdown brings high-level play, strategic depth, and crowd-fueled energy to the court. Whether you're cheering for the Drivers or backing the Ignite, this match is a showcase of what makes NPL team pickleball exciting to watch.
Video.title: NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite

Image.alt: NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite
NPL 2024 – Mixed Team Match – Drivers vs Ignite

Video.summary: In this Men’s Doubles Open Group C clash, Tom Turney and Sam Chajul take on Jamie Basford and Peter Hitchman. Watch as smart defense, aggressive drives, and well-timed net play define this intense showdown at the 2023 English Nationals. A standout match that reflects the growing depth of talent in British pickleball.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Video.summary: The 2023 English Open Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final brings serious heat as Ryler DeHeart and Megan Fudge square off against Nick Petterson and Susannah Barr. This final showcases elite shot-making, smart stacking strategies, and seamless teamwork from both sides of the net.With momentum shifting and nerves running high, every rally counts. From laser-focused drives to perfectly timed poaches, this match is a clinic in competitive mixed doubles and a thrilling conclusion to the Open division.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Video.summary: Watch as Pickleball Pros Dan Granot and Phillip Phillips, paired with NFL legend Brandon Siler and Pickleball professional Ryan Sherry, battle it out in this thrilling Men's Doubles match from the Picklebowl 2022. Filmed in the stunning Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event brings together celebrities and professional athletes representing their alma maters. The game is not only about competition but also raising funds for a great cause, benefiting Desire Street Ministries. With star power from both the sports and entertainment worlds, this exciting match is filled with hard-hitting shots, strategic play, and thrilling moments that will keep you on the edge of your seat.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Video.summary: Set at the scenic Troubadour Golf and Field Club in Nashville, TN, this exhibition match brings a mix of celebrity flair and friendly competition to the pickleball court. Olympian Shawn Johnson and her husband Andrew East take on TV host Jason Kennedy and pro Wes Burrows in a lighthearted yet tightly contested match that goes down to the wire. With Shawn still learning the ropes (and the rules), and Andrew channeling his athletic instincts, the duo puts up an impressive fight against the more experienced Kennedy and Burrows. It’s a fast-paced, fun-filled match full of laughs, learning moments, and great rallies—perfect for fans of lifestyle sports and celebrity matchups.
Video.title: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Image.alt: Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows
Troubadour Club 2024 – Exhibition Match – Johnson & East vs Kennedy & Burrows

Video.summary: Jason Kennedy and Wes Burrows challenge Taylor Lautner and David Dobrik.
Video.title: Taylor Lautner and David Dobrik

Image.alt: Taylor Lautner and David Dobrik
Taylor Lautner and David Dobrik
Taylor Lautner and David Dobrik

Video.summary: Dylan Frazier and Ritchie Tuazon meet Irina Tereschenko and Connor Pardoe in a high-stakes mixed doubles match at Picklebowl 2023. Set against the backdrop of this annual charity event, the match features four seasoned competitors known for their precision, quick reflexes, and court awareness. Expect fast-paced exchanges, smart teamwork, and big momentum swings as both teams battle for bragging rights and a good cause. Blending professional play with the spirited energy of Picklebowl, this match is a crowd favorite you won’t want to miss.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles – Frazier & Tuazon vs Tereschenko & Pardoe

Video.summary: Witness one of the most exciting finals from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome. In the Women's Senior Singles Open Final, Team England’s Anna Linton takes on Team Italy’s Paola Tampieri at the iconic Stadio dei Marmi. Linton starts with commanding form, dominating the first game with powerful forehand drives. However, the momentum shifts as Tampieri, fueled by a passionate home crowd, adjusts her strategy to target Linton’s backhand and level the match.
Video.title: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Image.alt: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Video.summary: Live from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome, Italy, witness back-to-back high-stakes matchups. First, in Women's Doubles Open, Team England’s Thaddea Lock and Katie Morris face off against Team France’s Elodie Busson and Adeline Nguyen. In a "nip and tuck" group decider, both teams trade aggressive volleys and "shake and bake" attacks before England finds a tactical edge to break the deadlock.
Video.title: Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover

Image.alt: Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover

Video.summary: November 16 - 18, 2023 at Palm Beach Gardens Tennis & Pickleball Center, all levels of players competed in the World Pickleball Open 2023!
Video.title: World Pickleball Open 2023

World Pickleball Open 2023
World Pickleball Open 2023
